## Summary

Describe the main change and the problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] Manual QA completed where applicable

## Screenshots or recordings

Include UI evidence for visual changes when relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and focused
- [ ] Public APIs, routes, or behavior changes are documented
- [ ] New strings, assets, and dependencies were reviewed
- [ ] I checked for regressions in related flows
